title: Rotating Grimace
description: Rotating Grimace is a unique platform puzzle game where you rotate the world to guide Mr Grimace to his lost stars. This is a great puzzle game with 40 challenge levels, push your logical brain abilities to the limit! Product feature bullets: • Grimace on board! • 40 different levels! • Very Fun for children! • Brain training for whole family! • Cute graphics! • Precise game physics! • Great sounds!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
